vision.title: The Vision
vision.hero_title: A booking platform that belongs to you
vision.hero_subtitle: Staylo isn't just another OTA. It's a platform owned collectively by the hoteliers, restaurants, and experience providers who power it.
vision.ownership_desc: Founding Members don't just use Staylo — they own a piece of it. Revenue is redistributed fairly to the community that generates it.
vision.phase1_desc: Hotels, guesthouses, resorts — fair booking with low commissions
vision.phase2_desc: Restaurants, food experiences — the fair alternative to TheFork & OpenTable
vision.phase3_desc: Activities, tours, wellness, nightlife — experience booking reimagined
vision.phase4_desc: Flights and transfers — completing the travel journey
vision.phase5_desc: Full platform with token governance and global provider ownership
vision.revenue_desc: Traditional platforms charge 15–25%. Staylo charges a flat 10% — and shares a portion back with the community.

founding_benefits.revenue_share: Share of platform revenue proportional to contribution
founding_benefits.governance: Vote on platform decisions and feature priorities
founding_benefits.guest_relationships: Direct Guest Relationships — Keep your guest data and build loyalty
founding_benefits.badge: Founding Member badge on your property listing

faq.q1: How is Staylo different from Booking.com?
faq.a1: Staylo is owned by its providers, not traditional shareholders. Commissions are 10% instead of 15–25%, and revenue is shared back with the community.
faq.a2: Founding Members participate in revenue sharing and governance decisions. As the platform grows, so does your stake.
faq.q3: When will Staylo launch for travelers?
faq.a3: We're currently onboarding hoteliers. Traveler-facing features launch once we have 500+ verified properties.
faq.q4: Is there a cost to join?
faq.a4: Registering your property on Staylo is completely free, no commitment. Becoming a Genesis Founder involves purchasing shares at $1,000 each. You only pay commissions (10%) when you receive bookings.
faq.a5: We're starting in Southeast Asia (Koh Phangan, Thailand) and expanding globally based on demand.
faq.q6: How are shares priced and how many can I buy?
faq.a6: Alpha shares are $1,000 each. Each property can hold 1 to 10 shares. Alpha price is the lowest — Phase V1 will be $1,500, Phase V2+ at market price.
faq.q7: What happens to my investment if Staylo doesn't work out?
faq.a7: All funds are held in a dedicated company account with full transparency. If the project doesn't reach critical mass, remaining funds are redistributed to shareholders proportionally.
faq.a8: 30% of net platform revenue is distributed as dividends, proportional to shares held. Dividends begin once the platform reaches operational profitability.

vision.cta_subtitle: Join {{count}}+ hoteliers who are taking back control of their business.
vision.structure_subtitle: A platform built, owned, and governed by the people who use it.
vision.structure_coop_desc: Staylo is a collectively-owned platform. Hoteliers are not customers, they are shareholders and decision-makers.
vision.structure_vote_desc: Governance is democratic. Whether you hold 1 share or 10, your property gets one equal vote on all platform decisions.
vision.structure_transfer_desc: Voting rights belong to the hotel, not the individual. To vote and hold founding status, the hotel must hold at least one share.
vision.btc_subtitle: Staylo is a Bitcoin-native cooperative platform. BTC as payment rail, treasury reserve, and investment currency.
vision.btc_payment_desc: Travelers pay by card, PayPal, bank transfer — or in Bitcoin via Lightning Network. Hoteliers receive THB, USD, EUR, or BTC. Their choice.
vision.btc_treasury_desc: 20% of ALL capital raised goes to a permanent Bitcoin reserve. Written into company statutes. 90% shareholder vote to change. At full scale: $149.7M in BTC. Never sold.
vision.btc_investment_desc: Founding Partners buy shares WITH Bitcoin. $1,000 in BTC = 1 Alpha share. Annual dividends claimable in BTC.
vision.btc_stat1: Hotel bookings paid in crypto by 2027
vision.capital_note: Acquisitions = signing 100 flagship hoteliers KP before M06. Commission = 10% revenue per booking (separate).
vision.fund_title: Founders, discover how you will invest in STAYLO
vision.fund_subtitle: Every dollar invested in Staylo funds the platform that replaces your OTA dependency. Click any line to discover the strategy behind it.
vision.btc_detail_title: Why we lock 20% of every raise in Bitcoin
vision.btc_detail_intro: Bitcoin is the only treasury reserve asset with a fixed supply (21M coins, ever), no central authority, and a 15-year track record of outperforming every other store of value. We lock 20% of the raise in a permanent BTC reserve, written into company statutes (90% supermajority required to change). This protects every Founder against currency debasement AND aligns Staylo with the most credible long-term reserve asset of our generation.
vision.btc_chart1_caption: From $13 to $100K — same asset, no central bank
vision.btc_chart2_caption: BTC = 13% of gold today. Closing the gap = 8× upside.
vision.btc_chart3_label: Companies with BTC on balance sheet
vision.btc_chart3_caption: From 5 in 2020 to 200+ in 2026. Adoption is accelerating.
vision.btc_charts_sources: Illustrative — Sources: CoinMarketCap, Bitcoin Treasuries, Companiesmarketcap
vision.acq_detail_intro: The acquisition envelope is the most tangible part of the raise. It buys real assets you can visit, photograph, and audit. Every Founding Partner gets a yearly invitation to see them.
vision.acq_reserve_body: A portion of the acquisition fund stays as a strategic cash reserve. Cannot be spent on anything else — it's our insurance against unexpected market shocks, slow months, or opportunistic acquisitions that present themselves outside the plan.
vision.acq_workspace_body: A real office in Koh Phangan where the team works, hosts hoteliers for onboarding, and welcomes Founding Partners visiting Thailand. Not a fancy WeWork — a productive base camp built for the people who build the platform.
vision.acq_hotel_title: A flagship hotel ON the platform
vision.acq_hotel_body: We acquire a real working hotel in Koh Phangan as our first STAYLO-owned property. It's our live testing ground for every feature (PMS, guest app, Pulse, schedule), our showcase for prospects, and a revenue-generating asset for the cooperative.
vision.acq_hq_body: Legal headquarters registered in Thailand — the country where we launch and where 70% of the platform's first 500 hotels will be. Anchoring the company physically where the business happens is a deliberate choice: we are not a Delaware-shell SaaS, we are a coop building from inside the market we serve.
vision.tech_detail_intro: The platform itself. Engineering, design, infrastructure, security audits. Every line of code we ship reduces a hotelier subscription elsewhere — we replace, not add.
vision.tech_web_body: The booking site, the hotelier dashboard, and the guest PWA (app.staylo.app) — all React, all installable, all reaching 14 languages on day one.
vision.tech_mobile_body: iOS + Android wraps via Capacitor for BLE room keys, NFC payments, push notifications, and biometric auth. Phase 2 priority once the PWA is validated.
vision.tech_pms_body: A full property management system + staff messenger — replaces 6-8 separate SaaS subscriptions hoteliers currently juggle. 17,800+ lines of UI shipped.
vision.tech_chain_body: Solana SPL Token-2022 deployment, NFT booking proofs, escrow smart contracts, Lightning Network payment rail integration. Security audits included.
vision.ops_detail_intro: STAYLO needs 18 months to reach the 500-hotel network effect. This envelope keeps the lights on — salaries, hosting, support, accounting — without diluting Founders for the bridge.
vision.ops_team_body: 5-7 full-time roles: engineering, product, hotelier success, content. 18-month runway lets us hit 500 hotels before needing a Series A — keeping you protected from dilution.
vision.ops_infra_body: Supabase, Vercel, S3 storage, CDN, email (Resend), monitoring (Sentry), domain registrations, SSL. Scales linearly with hotel count.
vision.ops_support_body: A real human team that visits hotels in person to set up properties, train staff, and capture feedback. Not a chatbot — Thailand-based humans speaking the local languages.
vision.ops_finops_body: Thai accounting firm + auditor, monthly reporting, quarterly investor updates, regulatory filings. Founding Partners get the books open.
vision.mkt_detail_intro: The smallest envelope, but every dollar carries leverage. Outreach brings hoteliers in. Legal makes the cooperative structure bulletproof. Audits make the on-chain layer credible.
vision.mkt_outreach_body: Door-to-door + digital outreach to the first 500 hotels in Thailand. Trade-show presence (HORECA, Hospitality Industry Forum), local press, hotelier association partnerships.
vision.mkt_content_body: Marketing site, video case studies, hotelier testimonials, multi-language SEO, social media — the assets that make a 5-minute meeting convert.
vision.mkt_legal_body: Thai law firm for cooperative structure, Founding Partner agreements, token issuance counsel (Solana SPL), GDPR / PDPA compliance, terms of service across 14 jurisdictions.
vision.mkt_audit_body: Third-party audit of the $STAY token contract, escrow smart contracts, and the payment rail. Critical before any real money moves through the platform.
vision.phase_wallet_desc: Built-in wallet with Lightning Network. Load in BTC, USDT, or card. Pay bookings, collect dividends, earn referrals.
vision.share_sale_subtitle: Phase Alpha — Founding Partners only. Limited to 3,000 shares.
vision.revenue_distribution_subtitle: Full transparency. Every dollar accounted for.
vision.goes_to_sv: Goes to shareholders in Silicon Valley
vision.breakdown_ambassador_desc: 2% lifetime passive income for the person who brought the hotel to Staylo
vision.breakdown_dividends_desc: Distributed to all founding partners proportionally
vision.ambassador_subtitle: You stay at a hotel on Staylo. You love the experience. Now you can earn from it — forever.
vision.marketing_subtitle: Build the world's largest accommodation network — and earn 2% passive income for life on every hotel you bring to Staylo. No limits. No expiry. Forever.
vision.ambassador_step1_desc: You visit a hotel on Staylo and discover a platform that truly respects its partners.
vision.ambassador_step2_desc: You tell other hotel owners about Staylo. If they join, you become their Ambassador.
vision.ambassador_step3_desc: You receive 2% of all online sales from every hotel you brought to Staylo. Forever.
vision.ambassador_lifetime_desc: On every booking, every service, every sale from the hotels you brought to Staylo.
vision.tripartite_desc: A binding agreement between all three parties. The Ambassador's 2% is guaranteed as long as the hotel stays on Staylo.
vision.example_disclaimer: Based on 20 rooms × $60/night × 365 days × 100% online booking rate. Actual results vary.
vision.fund_subtitle: Every dollar invested in Staylo funds the platform that replaces your OTA dependency.
vision.fund_tech_desc: Booking engine, mobile app, channel manager, PMS integration
vision.fund_marketing_desc: Traveler acquisition, SEO, content, launch campaigns
vision.founder_bio1: French hospitality entrepreneur based in Koh Phangan, Thailand, with nearly 40 years of experience across restaurants, bars, luxury service, tourism, and hospitality business development.
vision.founder_bio2: Having worked internationally in France, Monaco, Abu Dhabi, Moscow, and Thailand — and having founded several hospitality businesses — David understands firsthand the challenges faced by independent operators.
vision.founder_bio3: After years of seeing hotels lose control, margin, and influence to high-commission booking platforms, he created STAYLO with one clear mission:
vision.founder_quote: Give control back to those who host.
vision.founder_belief: STAYLO is built on the belief that independent hotels deserve a platform that is fairer, more respectful, and designed around their interests — not against them.

ambassador_guide.hero_subtitle: Everything you need to know to earn passive income with Staylo.
ambassador_guide.how_it_works_subtitle: Five clear steps from sign-up to passive income.
ambassador_guide.step1_desc: Register at /ambassador/register and activate hotel-referral commissions on your STAYLO code. It takes 2 minutes and is completely free.
ambassador_guide.step2_desc: Look for hotels, guesthouses, and resorts that use Booking.com or Airbnb. They currently pay 15-25% commission and would love to pay less.
ambassador_guide.step3_desc: Approach the owner or manager. Use the conversation scripts below to explain the value proposition clearly and confidently.
ambassador_guide.step4_desc: Give them your personal link: staylo.app/welcome?ref=YOUR-CODE. When they register through it, they are linked to you forever.
ambassador_guide.step5_desc: You receive 2% of all their online bookings through Staylo. Paid monthly. No cap. No expiry. No limit on how many hotels you bring.
ambassador_guide.scripts_subtitle: Three proven conversation scripts for different situations.
ambassador_guide.script_casual_context: For travelers staying at the hotel
ambassador_guide.script_casual_text: Hey, I just discovered this new platform called Staylo. It's like Booking.com but they only charge 10% instead of 22%. Hotels actually own the platform. Have you heard about it?
ambassador_guide.script_business_text: Hi, I represent Staylo — a new cooperative booking platform where hoteliers pay 10% commission instead of 15-25%. We're onboarding founding members in your region. Would you have 5 minutes to hear how it works?
ambassador_guide.script_numbers_text: How much do you pay Booking.com per month in commissions? Imagine keeping 50-60% of that. Staylo charges 10%, and the hotel owners actually own the platform. For a 20-room hotel, that's $30,000+ saved per year.
ambassador_guide.arguments_subtitle: Six powerful arguments to convince any hotel owner.
ambassador_guide.arg_commission_desc: Hotels save 50-60% on every booking compared to traditional OTAs.
ambassador_guide.arg_ownership_desc: Every hotel becomes a shareholder. Your platform, your profits.
ambassador_guide.arg_vote_desc: Democratic governance. Every property has an equal say in platform decisions.
ambassador_guide.arg_data_desc: Full access to guest information. Build direct relationships.
ambassador_guide.arg_parity_desc: Set your own prices freely. No forced rate matching with OTAs.
ambassador_guide.arg_founding_desc: Alpha price locks in now. Share price increases after this phase.
ambassador_guide.objections_subtitle: Common pushbacks and how to respond with confidence.
ambassador_guide.objection1_a: We're in alpha phase, launching region by region. That's exactly why the founding member price is only $1,000. Early joiners get the best deal — the share price goes up after this phase.
ambassador_guide.objection2_a: Are you happy paying them thousands per month? With Staylo you'd save 50-60% of those commissions AND become a shareholder in the platform. You'd actually own part of the system instead of just feeding it.
ambassador_guide.objection3_a: Your investment is protected. If Staylo doesn't reach critical mass, funds are redistributed to shareholders. Plus, at 10% commission, hotels have every reason to switch — the economics are undeniable.
ambassador_guide.objection4_q: I need to think about it
ambassador_guide.objection4_a: Of course! Here's my link — staylo.app/welcome?ref=YOUR-CODE. Take your time. Just know that alpha shares are limited to 3,000 and the price goes up after this phase. Registration is free either way.
ambassador_guide.objection5_a: Absolutely. Registration is completely free! You can sign up, explore the dashboard, see the savings calculator, and decide about shares later. No commitment required.
ambassador_guide.calculator_subtitle: See how much you could earn as an ambassador.
ambassador_guide.slider_label: How many hotels can you bring?
ambassador_guide.total_basis: Based on avg {{rooms}} rooms x ${{rate}}/night x {{occupancy}}% occupancy x 2%

ambassador_guide.toolkit_link_desc: Share this with every hotel you talk to.
ambassador_guide.toolkit_website_desc: Send this to hotels who want to learn more first.
ambassador_guide.toolkit_vision_desc: Share with skeptics. Explains the full model, roadmap, and cooperative structure.
ambassador_guide.whatsapp_template: Hi! I wanted to share something interesting with you. There's a new booking platform called Staylo — it works like Booking.com but only charges 10% commission instead of 15-25%. The hotels actually own the platform as shareholders. They're onboarding founding members right now at a special price. Check it out: staylo.app/welcome?ref=YOUR-CODE

booking.deal_desc: On OTAs, 15–25% commission goes to middlemen. On STAYLO, the difference goes back to the hotel — where it belongs.
booking.advantage_desc: Hoteliers are the sole price-setters. STAYLO keeps only 10% commission — the margin (vs. 15–25% on OTAs) goes back to the hotel, not to middlemen.

home_how.label: How it works
home_how.title: Two sides, one fair platform
home_how.subtitle: STAYLO is built around two audiences — travelers who book stays and hoteliers who host them. Both win, and both can become co-owners.
home_how.footer: Built with hoteliers, for hoteliers. Alone, it is impossible. Together, we are unstoppable.
home_how.tr_step1_desc: Search and book hotels at the fairest commission on the market.
home_how.tr_step2_desc: Every night you book earns $STAY tokens — yours to use, vote, or trade.
home_how.tr_step3_desc: Refer a hotel to STAYLO and earn Bitcoin on every booking they receive — for life.
home_how.ho_step1_desc: Sign up in 15 minutes. Free listing. No exclusivity required.
home_how.ho_step2_desc: 10% commission, contractual, locked for life. Paid within 1 hour after check-out.
home_how.ho_step2_b3: No hidden fees, no surge pricing
home_how.ho_step3_desc: Buy a Founding Partner share and become a real co-owner of the platform.

home_testimonials.review1_quote: Finally, a platform where hoteliers come first. We save $4,000/month on commissions and actually own part of the platform.
home_testimonials.review2_quote: The 10% commission changed our business. We reinvest the savings into guest experience. Our reviews went up 0.3 stars.
home_testimonials.review3_quote: I was skeptical at first, but the governance model is real. One property, one vote. We actually decide the platform's future.

roster.empty_state: No employees yet. Click "+ New employee" to start building your team.
roster.empty_state_filtered: No employees in {dept}. Switch the filter to see other departments.

placeholder.housing_description: e.g. 18m² room with private bathroom, AC, wifi, behind staff building. Smoking outside only.

btn.add_custom_role: + Add a new role to the catalog

hint.auto_shift_detail: worked + break ({hours}h/wk ÷ {days}d/wk) — pre-fills end time when editing shifts.

confirm.delete: Delete this employee record? This cannot be undone.

add_role_modal.title: Add a custom role
add_role_modal.desc: Create a job title not in the built-in catalog. The role inherits the department's channels and access tier.

placeholder.name: e.g. Sommelier, Spa Receptionist, Boat Captain

alert.duplicate_name: A role with this name already exists.

nav.skip_break_pending_tooltip: {n} staff member{plural} requested to skip their break — needs your approval

schedule.readonly_hint: 🔒 Read-only view — only your department manager can edit shifts.

empty.dept_no_employees: No employees in the {dept} department yet.
empty.add_in_roster: No employees yet. Add team members in the Roster tab first.
empty.ask_hr: No team members in your department yet. Ask HR/GM to add them.

day_header.click_to_open: Click to open this day in detail (hourly Gantt view)

cell.add_shift_tooltip: Add shift — or drop a shift from another day
cell.add_shift_row_tooltip: Add shift — or drop a shift from another row
cell.locked_tooltip: 🔒 Locked — payslip already paid for this month
cell.locked_long: 🔒 Locked — this month's payslip has been paid
cell.click_edit_drag_move: Click to edit or delete · drag to another day to move (Ctrl+drag = copy)
cell.click_edit_remove_drag: Click to edit or remove · drag to another day to move ·
cell.break_skipped_tooltip: ✓ Break officially skipped (approved). Worked time = full shift, no break deduction.

row.open_fiche_tooltip: Click to open this employee's staff fiche

day_view.bar_tooltip_editable: {start}–{end}{overnight} · break {min}min{at_clause} · click to edit · drag to reassign (Ctrl=copy)

dashboard.at_work_now_tooltip: {clocked} clocked in · {scheduled} scheduled to be working right now ({total} in scope)
dashboard.today_worked_planned_tooltip: Today only — does not change if you edit a shift on another day
dashboard.planned_period_tooltip: Sum of all planned hours across the visible period — updates whenever you add/edit/delete any shift in this view
dashboard.absences_period_tooltip_clickable: Click for full breakdown by type, employee and date
dashboard.absences_period_tooltip_empty: No absences in the visible period

absence_breakdown.heading: {n} day{plural} {period}{scope}
absence_breakdown.row_tooltip: Click to open this day in detail
absence_breakdown.footer_hint: Click any row to jump to that day in the Day view.

events.title: 📅 Events & holidays
events.catalog_intro: Events for {flag} {country}. Toggle each one on/off — they'll show on schedule day headers.
events.custom_empty: No custom events yet. Add hotel-specific events below (themed dinners, anniversary, local festivals…).

shift_editor.subtitle: {first_name} {last_name} · {day_label}
shift_editor.copy_from_colleague_hint: Tap to pre-fill the form with another {role_or_team}'s shift pattern.

label.end_time_auto: End time (auto = start + {hours}h work + break, override allowed)
label.apply_days: Apply to which days this week?

shift_editor.worked_hours_hint: Worked hours = end − start − break. When you change Start, all 3 derived fields auto-recompute. Override any after if needed.
shift_editor.series_detected: 💡 Series detected: {n} matching shifts pre-selected. Save updates all of them, Delete removes all of them. Uncheck any to exclude.

confirm.delete_many:
Delete {n} entries ({days})?

Uncheck days in the picker to exclude them.

clear_scope.title: 🗑️ Clear shifts
clear_scope.subtitle: {first_name} {last_name} — pick a scope. All operations are undoable for 12 seconds.
clear_scope.confirm_strong_all: ⚠️ This wipes EVERY shift ever scheduled for {first_name}.

skip_break.staff_btn_tooltip: Skip your break today (requires manager approval)
skip_break.warning_body_1: Skipping your break requires manager approval. Once approved, the break time will be
skip_break.warning_body_2: (you receive your full hours). Use this only when a real operational reason prevents you from taking a break (rush, understaffing, emergency).
skip_break.reason_placeholder: e.g. Understaffed today — bar fully booked from 18h to 23h, no time to step away

alert.reason_required: Please explain why you cannot take your break. Your manager needs context to approve.

confirm.submit:
Submit skip-break request?

Your manager will be notified. Until approved, your shift continues as normal.

skip_break.staff_pill_approved_tooltip: Manager approved your no-break request. Break time is paid as worked time.
skip_break.staff_pill_pending_tooltip: Awaiting manager approval. Once approved, your break time will be paid as worked time.

review.heading: {n} pending
review.deny_prompt: Optional: reason for denial (the staff will see this):
review.approve_confirm:
Approve break skip for {first_name} on {date}?

The {break} min of break time will be paid as worked time on this shift.

payroll.access_denied: 🔒 Payroll access is reserved for HR / GM and department managers.
payroll.subtitle: {count} employees{scope} · click a row to open the payslip

pool.locked_label: 🔒 Locked until TGE M07 + custodial wallet legal audit

cell.pool_fiat_tooltip: Sum of all fiat pools landing on this month — see payslip for breakdown
cell.pool_fiat_empty_tooltip: No fiat pool distributed for this month
cell.pool_stay_tooltip: Sum of $STAY pools landing on this month
cell.pool_stay_empty_tooltip: No $STAY pool distributed for this month

payslip.access_denied: 🔒 You can only open payslips for your own department.

lock.title: 🔒 LOCKED — Payslip marked as PAID
lock.description: All fields are read-only. The schedule for this month is also locked. Click "Reopen" to revert to Approved status and edit again.
lock.reopen_confirm:
Reopen this payslip ?

Status will revert to "Approved", schedule edits become possible again, and you can modify amounts. The original "Paid" timestamp is logged in audit trail.

payslip.manual_deductions_hint: Auto deductions (housing, paid meals, unpaid absences) are added below from the contract — you don't need to repeat them here.

bonus.locked_empty: No bonuses on this paid payslip.

deduction.locked_empty: No manual deductions on this paid payslip.

stay.title: 💎 $STAY Equity Bonus (token, non-cash)
stay.disclaimer: Distributed to your custodial wallet on staylo.app at TGE M07. Not part of your monthly NET salary.

shortfall.heading: ⏱️ Hours shortfall — {status}
shortfall.body_within_tolerate: {hours}h not worked (planned − actual). Tolerance is {tolerance}h/month — no deduction applied.
shortfall.body_exceeds_tolerate: {hours}h not worked (vs {tolerance}h tolerance). Current policy doesn't deduct — change to "deduct" in Hotel Settings if you want it billed.
shortfall.body_within_deduct: {hours}h not worked, within {tolerance}h tolerance — no deduction.
shortfall.body_deducted: {hours}h not worked. {tolerance}h is tolerated; the remaining {beyond}h is deducted at the hourly rate (see Charges above).
shortfall.body_flagged: {hours}h not worked (beyond {tolerance}h tolerance). Decide manually: deduct via "Add deduction", request make-up, or accept.

bik.title: 🎁 Benefits in kind (avantages en nature)
bik.subtitle: Provided in addition to cash salary — economic value, NOT deducted from net.

payment.bank_name_placeholder: e.g. Bangkok Bank, Kasikorn, BNP Paribas
payment.tx_ref_placeholder: e.g. TX12345 or wire confirmation number
payment.cash_warning_body: the printed payslip will produce TWO copies on one A4 page. Both must be signed by the employee AND the manager. One stays at the hotel, one goes to the employee.

confirm.delete: Delete this saved payslip? Auto-computed values will reappear next time you open it.

alert.popup_blocked: Pop-up blocked. Allow pop-ups for this page to print payslips.

bik.title: 🎁 Benefits in kind (avantages en nature)
bik.subtitle: Provided in addition to cash salary — economic value, NOT included in net to pay.

stay.title: 💎 $STAY Equity Bonus (token, non-cash)
stay.subtitle: Distributed to employee custodial wallet on staylo.app post-TGE. NOT included in net to pay — separate token bonus.

payment.cash_note: This payslip is issued in two copies, one for the hotel and one for the employee.

settings.title: ⚙️ Hotel Settings
settings.readonly_hint: 🔒 Only General Manager / Deputy / Operations Manager / department managers can change these settings.

label.hotel_legal: Legal info (Tax ID / VAT / Company N° — multi-line)

identity.sub: Appears on every printed payslip and contract. Fill it in once.

placeholder.hotel_name: e.g. Sunset Beach Resort & Spa Co. Ltd.
placeholder.hotel_address:
12/34 Moo 5, Haad Rin
Koh Phangan, Surat Thani 84280
Thailand
placeholder.evacuation: Walk calmly… do not use elevators… help mobility-impaired guests…
placeholder.outlets: Main Restaurant, Sunset Bar, Pool Cafe, Banquet Hall

logo.too_large: "{name}" is too large ({size}KB > 500KB cap). Resize it first or use SVG.

outlets.hint: Comma-separated. Required if your hotel has multiple restaurants/bars — lets the chef filter the schedule by venue.

payroll.sub: When an employee works fewer hours than planned (e.g. clocked out early), what should the payslip do?
payroll.tolerance_hint: Tolerance absorbs minor monthly variance (long lunch, traffic delay, end-of-shift cleanup overrun). Below this threshold, no deduction applies regardless of policy.

shortfall.flag: 🚩 Flag for manager review (no auto deduction)

pools.sub: A hotel can run any number of pools simultaneously: monthly F&B service charge, annual bonus on % of revenue, one-shot performance push, $STAY equity (post-TGE)… Each pool is configured by its source, frequency, and distribution method. Points-per-role and per-employee overrides are shared across all pools.

list.empty_state: No pools configured. Click "+ Add a pool" below to create one.

pools.confirm_delete:
Delete pool "{name}"?

This also removes any distribution records associated with it. Cannot be undone.

role_points.label: ⭐ Points per role — bareme 1 (entry) → 7 (top management)
role_points.hint: Used by every pool that distributes "by points" or "by points × hours". 0 = excluded from those pools. Per-employee override available on each staff fiche.

timeclock.sub: Staff can only clock in/out within X meters of these GPS coordinates. Prevents clock-in fraud (e.g. from home).

geolocation.unavailable: Geolocation API not available on this device.

geofence.strict_label: Strict mode: BLOCK clock-in outside geofence (vs. warn-and-flag)

biometric.sub: When enabled, staff must unlock the app with their fingerprint or Face ID on every open. Their phone is bound to their account in the DB. Requires HTTPS deployment — won't work locally.
biometric.toggle_label: Require biometric authentication on app open
biometric.unsupported: ⚠️ This browser doesn't support WebAuthn (biometric API). Toggle has no effect here.

demo_live.sub: When you start a fresh hotel, Staylo auto-loads example employees, recipes and tasks so you can explore the UI. Once you're ready to use it for real, switch to LIVE mode — all demo data is wiped and only your own real records remain.

live.banner_detail: No demo data is loaded. All employees, recipes and tasks are real.

demo.banner: 🎭 Demo mode active. Currently loaded: {employees} demo employees · {recipes} recipes · {tasks} tasks. You can delete any of them individually as you replace them with real ones.

reseed.confirm: Re-seed the demo dataset? This adds the example team back (does NOT touch your already-saved real records).
reseed.success: ✓ Demo dataset re-seeded (90-day schedule + 75-day timesheet — ready for monthly payroll editing).

seed_big.tooltip: Seed ~140 staff covering EVERY role across all 9 departments — useful to see the full org tree
seed_big.confirm:
🏰 Seed BIG hotel team?

This loads ~140 staff covering ALL 9 departments + EVERY role in the catalogue:
  • Management · Front Office · Housekeeping · F&B
  • Maintenance · Spa & Wellness · Security
  • Admin & Finance · Sales & Events

Wipes existing demo employees first (your own auto-linked manager record stays). Schedule + timesheet are also regenerated for the new team. Continue?
seed_big.success: 🏰 Seeded {count} staff across 9 departments. 90-day schedule + 75-day clocked events generated. Open the Roster tab and use the dept filter to navigate.

confirm.heading: 🚀 Switch this hotel to LIVE mode?
confirm.delete_attached: • All schedules / clock events / payslips attached to demo staff
confirm.keep_settings: • All hotel settings + pools + clock-in events for kept staff
confirm.footer: After this, demo will NOT auto-load on next boot. Continue?

switch_live.success: 🚀 Switched to LIVE mode. Demo data removed — your records kept.

label.enabled: Pool enabled — appears in Payroll & gets distributed

percentage.hint: Informational only. Manager enters actual amount per period in the Pool Manager.

fixed.hint: Manager-set budget. Same amount each period until changed.

tenure.hint: Staff hired less than X months ago is excluded. 0 = no filter.

require_points.hint: If checked, only staff with role-points > 0 (or override) participate. Uncheck for "every staff equally" pools.

stay_warn.title: 💎 $STAY Equity Pool — locked until TGE M07.
stay_warn.body: This pool type will be activated post-Token Generation Event + custodial wallet legal audit. For now, you can configure it but distributions are blocked.

delete.confirm:
Delete pool "{name}"?

This also removes any distribution records associated with it.

locked_banner.title: 💎 $STAY Equity Pool — locked until TGE M07.
locked_banner.body: Configuration is editable, but distributions are blocked until the Token Generation Event + custodial wallet legal audit greenlight.

distributed_banner.title: ✓ This pool has been distributed.
distributed_banner.body: Each eligible staff sees the amount added to their payslip Earnings. To re-distribute, delete this record and create a new one.

pool_manager.empty_total: Enter the total pool amount above to see the distribution preview.
pool_manager.empty_eligible: ⚠️ No eligible staff for this period. Check Settings → Pool role points (if "by points"), or verify timesheet data (if weighted by hours), or relax tenure / department filters.

hint.fb_service: Tip: {pct}% of your F&B revenue this period is the typical pool. Calculate from your POS reports.
hint.revenue_pct: Tip: {pct}% of your hotel revenue this period.
hint.profit_pct: Tip: {pct}% of your net profit this period.
hint.stay_token: 🔒 $STAY pool — distribution blocked until TGE M07.

delete.confirm: Delete this pool record? Distributed amounts will be removed from each staff's payslip earnings.

alert.no_eligible_staff: No eligible staff to distribute to.

distribute.confirm:
Distribute {amount} {currency} across {count} staff for {period}?

Each staff's payslip Earnings will get a "{name}" line added automatically. You can still delete this record later if you need to redo it.

legacy.no_pool: No pool configured. Open Settings → Pools to add one.

fb_service.label: 🥂 F&B Service Charge
fb_service.desc: 10% (or %) of F&B revenue, redistributed to staff

revenue_pct.label: 📈 % of Total Revenue
revenue_pct.desc: X% of monthly hotel revenue → staff bonus pool

fixed.label: 🎯 Fixed Amount
fixed.desc: Manager sets a fixed budget per period

stay_token.label: 💎 $STAY Equity Pool
stay_token.desc: Distribute $STAY tokens from hotel treasury — Coming at TGE (M07)

pool_distributions.equal: ⚖️ Equal split — every eligible staff gets the same
pool_distributions.by_points_hours: 🎯 By points × hours (default — rewards both rank + presence)

tooltip.tap_back: Tap when you are back at your post
tooltip.skip_break: Skip your break today (requires manager approval)
tooltip.skip_approved: Manager approved your no-break request. Break time is paid as worked time.
tooltip.skip_pending: Awaiting manager approval. Once approved, your break time will be paid as worked time.

confirm.start_break:
Start your break now?

The app will remind you 5 minutes before the end and when it's time to come back ({minutes}min total).

banner.next_shift_today: Next shift today: {start}–{end} (in {minutes}min you can clock in)

empty.manager: No tasks scheduled for this date. Click "+ New task" to create one (with optional recurrence).
empty.staff: No tasks assigned to you for this date. Enjoy! 🎉

confirm.delete_recurring: Delete this task (and all its future recurrences)?

recur_hint.per_shift: ⏱️ Fires every time the assignee starts a shift

empty.manager: No recipes yet. Build standardized recipes with cost breakdown — POS-ready.
empty.staff: No recipes available. Ask the chef to add some.

section.equipment_hint: What the cook needs to gather before starting (wok, mandoline, thermomix…).
section.photos_hint: Upload multiple photos: ingredients shot, technique steps, plating final, etc.

photos.too_large: "{name}" too large (max 500KB per photo to fit demo storage). Resize first.

step1.title: Who are you here as?
step1.hint: Each path opens a different Staylo experience.

step2.title: What's your name?
step2.hint: This is how others will see you.

hint.staff: Get this from your manager (e.g. KP001 for Koh Phangan property #1).
hint.ambassador: Your personal Staylo Ambassador ID (e.g. AMB-7421).
hint.guest: From your reservation confirmation, or just the hotel code if you're curious.

step4.title: Your role
step4.hint: Pick the one that matches your day-to-day.

staff.title: Hotel Staff
staff.desc: Internal team — reception, housekeeping, kitchen, maintenance, management.

ambassador.title: Network Ambassador
ambassador.desc: Refer hotels to Staylo and earn commission.

guest.title: Guest
guest.desc: I'm staying at a Staylo hotel.

alerts_view.title: 🔔 Alerts
alerts_view.subtitle: Channels with unread messages
alerts_view.empty: ✓ All caught up — no unread messages.

context.tooltip: Recent activity & context for this employee — helps the manager calibrate the briefing.

shift_editor.outlet_default_hint: Default: {outlet}. Changes here update the selected days; past shifts keep their stored outlet.
shift_editor.briefing_placeholder: e.g. "VIP Mr Tanaka arrives at 14:00 — prepare welcome amenity. Sarah is off, you cover the lobby. Group breakfast 10:00 = priority."
shift_editor.briefing_too_short: Briefing too short to save as template.
shift_editor.briefing_hint: 💡 Auto-saved as draft as you type — never lost on Cancel.
shift_editor.tasks_empty: No tasks planned for this day yet. Use the row below to add one.
shift_editor.copy_colleague_hint: Tap to pre-fill the form with another {who}'s shift pattern.
shift_editor.no_employees: No employees yet. Add team members in the Roster tab first.
shift_editor.readonly_hint: 🔒 Read-only view — only your department manager can edit shifts.

tasks_tab.empty_mgr: No tasks scheduled for this date. Click "+ New task" to create one (with optional recurrence).
tasks_tab.empty_staff: No tasks assigned to you for this date. Enjoy! 🎉
tasks_tab.delete_confirm_recur: Delete this task (and all its future recurrences)?

settings.title: ⚙️ Hotel Settings
settings.readonly_hint: 🔒 Only General Manager / Deputy / Operations Manager / department managers can change these settings.
settings.sec_identity_sub: Appears on every printed payslip and contract. Fill it in once.
settings.lbl_hotel_legal: Legal info (Tax ID / VAT / Company N° — multi-line)

cards.no_quick_actions: No quick actions for your role yet.

score.tile_desc: Your hotel vs the network · live benchmark · peer ranking
score.head_subtitle: Your hotel benchmarked against {n} anonymous Staylo properties — live.
score.tagline: You're not alone in the room. You're the best in the network.
score.sec_radar_sub: Where you outperform vs where you lose ground. Anonymized network average updated every 6h.
score.sec_kpis_sub: Each KPI with your value, network avg, your rank percentile, and 30-day trend.
score.kpi_help_revpar: Revenue per available room (rooms revenue ÷ available rooms)
score.kpi_help_guest_return: % of guests who booked again within 12 months
score.sec_rank_sub: Anonymized peer hotels by score. Positions update every few seconds — your network is alive.
score.insight_1_d: F&B margin 14% above network avg → renegotiate contracts with proof.
score.insight_2_d: Staff efficiency below avg → add automation tooling, reuse Staylo modules to catch up.
score.insight_3_d: Anonymized comparison gives every hotelier-owner peer pressure to improve, without exposing private data.
score.insight_4_d: Network position is a vanity metric only investors care about. Now you have it on a phone screen.
score.demo_note: 🎭 Demo mode — benchmark figures are simulated. Production reads anonymized aggregates from the cooperative's data lake.

stock.tile_desc: Predictive inventory · auto-deduct from recipes · stockout alerts
stock.head_subtitle: Predictive inventory wired to your fiches techniques. Each order auto-deducts ingredients, every stockout is forecast before it bites.
stock.tagline: Know what runs out — before it runs out.
stock.sec_critical_sub: Stockouts predicted in less than 4 hours at current consumption rate.
stock.critical_covers_at_risk: {n} covers/hour at risk if no action
stock.sec_all_stock_sub: Sorted by urgency. Click any item to see linked dishes + history.
stock.sec_deductions_sub: Each Pulse order auto-deducts via the linked recipe. Live feed.
stock.sec_deductions_empty: No deductions yet — Pulse hasn't fired any orders.
stock.sec_restock_sub: Scheduled deliveries from your suppliers. Auto-suggestions appear when stock is low.
stock.demo_note: 🎭 Demo mode — stock levels and consumption rates are simulated. Connect to your real inventory to see live data.

pulse.tile_desc: Connect every POS · live revenue · auto pool distribution
pulse.head_subtitle: The nervous system above every POS — connect, see, distribute.
pulse.tagline: Not a POS. The orchestrator above ALL POS.
pulse.sec_connectors_sub: Plug Staylo on top of your existing system. Switch later — Staylo keeps the history.
pulse.sec_live_stream_sub: Each ring lands here in <300ms via webhook. Every order tagged + routed.
pulse.sec_pool_live_sub: Watch each waiter's tip jar fill in real time. No more month-end calculation hell.
pulse.sec_revenue_pulse_sub: Today's revenue updates with every transaction, in 5 currencies live.
pulse.feat_realtime_pool_d: Servers see their tip jar fill as orders ring. Distributed in fiat OR $STAY.
pulse.feat_recipe_stock_d: Each ring auto-deducts ingredients. Predicts stockouts before they happen.
pulse.feat_cross_venue_d: Guest's wristband charges bar + spa + F&B → unified checkout in any currency.
pulse.feat_ambassador_d: Referred guest spends → 10% commission auto-credited to the ambassador.
pulse.feat_compliance_d: Thai e-Tax Invoice, French NF525, EU fiscal — auto-generated per country.
pulse.feat_offline_d: Power outage on the island? Orders ring locally, sync when network returns.
pulse.feat_nft_d: Every booking + meal mints an optional NFT. Cross-hotel loyalty, on-chain.
pulse.feat_coop_d: Each transaction across the network feeds a small % to all hotelier-owners. Built-in.
pulse.sec_demo_note: 🎭 Demo mode — orders below are simulated. Connect a real POS to see live data.

dialogs.access_denied_post: Access denied: you cannot post in this channel.

Paste it in a new tab to test as this employee, or send it to them by email.

dialogs.invite_unrecognized: Invite link not recognized for hotel {hotel}. Ask your manager for a fresh QR.

Reopen this payslip ?

Status will revert to "Approved", schedule edits become possible again, and you can modify amounts. The original "Paid" timestamp is logged in audit trail.
dialogs.delete_payslip: Delete this saved payslip? Auto-computed values will reappear next time you open it.

Submit skip-break request?

Your manager will be notified. Until approved, your shift continues as normal.

recipes.math_total_cost_formula: Sum of every ingredient cost (qty × unit price, with unit conversion).
recipes.math_total_cost_example: {cost} {cur} = total of all ingredients in this recipe
recipes.math_margin_formula: (Sell price − cost per portion) ÷ sell price × 100
recipes.math_margin_no_sell: Set a sell price to see the margin.
recipes.math_food_cost_no_sell: Set a sell price to see the food cost ratio.
recipes.math_benchmark_text:
🟢 Food cost ≤ 28% — excellent
🟡 Food cost 28-35% — acceptable, watch portion sizes
🔴 Food cost > 35% — re-cost or raise sell price

roster_fiche.add_custom_role: ➕ Add a new role to the catalog
roster_fiche.auto_shift_suffix: worked + break ({h}h/wk ÷ {d}d/wk) — pre-fills end time when editing shifts.
roster_fiche.warn_weekly_illegal: ⛔ Above legal weekly cap: {h}h/wk exceeds {max}h max ({country}).
roster_fiche.warn_no_rest: ⛔ Insufficient rest: minimum {min} day(s) off per week required ({country}).
roster_fiche.venue_empty_msg: No venues configured (Spa, restaurants, salon, boutique…).
roster_fiche.venue_add_prompt: Name the new venue (Spa, Sunset Bar, Beach Pavilion, Pastry Kitchen…)
roster_fiche.venue_added_toast: ✓ Venue "{name}" added — assigned to this employee
roster_fiche.ph_housing_description: e.g. 18m² room with private bathroom, AC, wifi, behind staff building. Smoking outside only.
roster_fiche.confirm_delete: Delete this employee record? This cannot be undone.

onboarding.step_audience_hint: Each path opens a different Staylo experience.
onboarding.step_name_hint: This is how others will see you.
onboarding.step_role_hint: Pick the one that matches your day-to-day.
onboarding.audience_staff_desc: Internal team — reception, housekeeping, kitchen, maintenance, management.
onboarding.audience_ambassador_desc: Refer hotels to Staylo and earn commission.
onboarding.audience_guest_desc: I'm staying at a Staylo hotel.
onboarding.code_staff_hint: Get this from your manager (e.g. KP001 for Koh Phangan property #1).
onboarding.code_ambassador_hint: Your personal Staylo Ambassador ID (e.g. AMB-7421).
onboarding.code_guest_hint: From your reservation confirmation, or just the hotel code if you're curious.

schedule_nav.dash_toggle_tooltip: Show or hide the four stat cards (At work now, Worked, Planned, Absences).
schedule_nav.dash_at_work_now_tip: {in} clocked in · {sched} scheduled to be working right now ({total} in scope)
schedule_nav.dash_today_only_tip: Today only — does not change if you edit a shift on another day
schedule_nav.dash_planned_tip: Sum of all planned hours across the visible period — updates whenever you add/edit/delete any shift in this view
schedule_nav.dash_absences_tip_yes: Click for full breakdown by type, employee and date
schedule_nav.dash_absences_tip_no: No absences in the visible period

charges.title: Charges
charges.subtitle: {hotelCode} · monthly P&L
charges.empty_state: No entries — click "+ Add line" to start.
charges.payroll_info: Auto-summed from {n} employee salaries. Edit in Roster.
charges.copy_tooltip: Copy all entries from {prev} into {cur}. Useful for recurring fixed costs (rent, subscriptions). Replaces current entries.
charges.copy_confirm:
Copy entries from {prev} into {cur}?

This REPLACES the current month's entries.
charges.export_tooltip: Download a CSV of every line for this month — accountant-friendly.

shell.clock_back_title: Tap when you are back at your post
shell.break_skipped_approved_title: Manager approved your no-break request. Break time is paid as worked time.
shell.break_skip_pending_title: Awaiting manager approval. Once approved, your break time will be paid as worked time.
shell.break_start_confirm:
Start your break now?

The app will remind you 5 minutes before the end and when it's time to come back ({n}min total).
shell.break_skip_title: Skip your break today (requires manager approval)
